title: Ability for multiple lines on graph
excerpt: I’m trying to create a graph on a dashboard that displays figures from multiple boards and I want the graph to be a multi-line graph with a separate line for each board connected (I am trying to plot number of tests vs n…

posts.author: EmilyWill (Emily)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to create a graph on a dashboard that displays figures from multiple boards and I want the graph to be a multi-line graph with a separate line for each board connected (I am trying to plot number of tests vs number of quality incidents per month, with the figures pulled from separate boards). Unfortunately, monday.com support have said currently the dashboards feature does not support displaying separate lines for each board in a single graph, and the data can only be displayed cumulatively across boards. Is there any way around this?

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
EmilyWill:

Is there any way around this?

@EmilyWill You can do that with the Analytics & Reports add-on by Screenful. You can create a custom line chart with multiple lines. Each line can have its own filter, including a board filter. Here’s an example chart:

CleanShot 2026-01-29 at 13.33.011305×690 84.9 KB

Charts can be placed on a Monday dashboard or scheduled to be sent via email. Here’s the guide for getting started with a free trial.
